positive: A minimalist, geometric representation of a wise, anthropomorphic owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl is stylized with sharp angles and elegant curves, rendered in contrasting black and white ink, giving it a strong silhouette and ethereal feel. The background consists of faint, abstract celestial patterns (stars, nebulae) using deep indigo and muted gold accents. The overall style is modern graphic design, reminiscent of Art Deco linocut printing or sophisticated scientific illustration. High contrast, central composition, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Cinematic studio lighting, ultra-detailed vector graphics, clean lines, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, logos, trademarks, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, grainy, signature, disfigured, cartoon, messy, realistic photography
